title: SauriaLib
description: A GeckoLib 3 fork with fixes and patches, for Cleanroom. Fully compatible with  old mods.
body:
SauriaLib is a fork of 1.12.2 GeckoLib 3. It is compatible with all old 1.12.2 mods using old GeckoLib3.

### **This mod requires Cleanroom Loader**

Changes:
- Fixed massive log spam when launching the game
- Fixed weird shadow on models. It may look weird to other players though
- Allow example mod to be enabled in production, make testing more handy
- Fixed armor helmet located in a wrong position when sneaking

Planning:
- Transparent texture
- Abstract geo object so you can render model anywhere
- [Lumenized](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lumenized) support
- Employ [CodeChickenLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/codechicken-lib-cre) so you don't need the item/block to be a TE

About [RiftLibrary](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/riftlibrary): I aware another fork of GeckoLib exists, but it is not ABI compatible.
